controls.title: Governance — Board-Approved Cyber Risk Strategy
controls.description: Board-approved cyber-risk strategy aligned with institution's risk appetite (FFIEC CAT Domain 1, Baseline).

controls.title: Risk Management — Documented Cyber Risk Assessment
controls.description: Documented enterprise-wide cyber risk assessment, refreshed annually (FFIEC CAT Domain 1, Baseline).

controls.title: Resources — Adequate Cyber Resourcing
controls.description: Cybersecurity function staffed + budgeted to support the institution's risk profile (FFIEC CAT Domain 1, Baseline).

controls.title: Training + Culture — Annual Awareness Training
controls.description: All personnel receive annual cybersecurity awareness training (FFIEC CAT Domain 1, Baseline).

controls.title: Governance — Cyber Risk Reporting Framework
controls.description: Cyber risk reporting cadence + content defined for board / committee + senior management (FFIEC CAT Domain 1, Evolving).

controls.title: Risk Management — Quantitative Risk Modeling
controls.description: Cyber risk quantification using FAIR or similar framework (FFIEC CAT Domain 1, Advanced).

controls.title: Threat Intelligence — FS-ISAC Membership
controls.description: Membership in FS-ISAC (or equivalent sector ISAC) for threat-intelligence sharing (FFIEC CAT Domain 2, Baseline).

controls.title: Threat Intelligence — Threat-Source Diversification
controls.description: Threat-intelligence sources include: government (CISA), commercial vendors, sector ISACs, peer institutions (FFIEC CAT Domain 2, Baseline).

controls.title: Information Sharing — Bilateral Peer Sharing
controls.description: Bilateral information-sharing relationships with peer institutions (FFIEC CAT Domain 2, Evolving).

controls.title: Threat Intelligence — Threat Modeling Integration
controls.description: Threat intelligence drives threat modeling for new + existing systems (FFIEC CAT Domain 2, Intermediate).

controls.title: Preventative — Patch Management
controls.description: Documented patch management process with severity-driven SLAs (FFIEC CAT Domain 3, Baseline).

controls.title: Preventative — Anti-Malware Coverage
controls.description: Anti-malware deployed on all endpoints + servers + email gateways (FFIEC CAT Domain 3, Baseline).

controls.title: Preventative — MFA on Privileged + Remote Access
controls.description: MFA on all privileged accounts + remote access (FFIEC CAT Domain 3, Baseline).

controls.title: Preventative — Network Segmentation
controls.description: Network segmented into trust zones with controlled inter-zone traffic (FFIEC CAT Domain 3, Baseline).

controls.title: Preventative — Encryption at Rest + in Transit
controls.description: Sensitive data encrypted at rest + in transit using industry-accepted algorithms (FFIEC CAT Domain 3, Baseline).

controls.title: Detective — 24x7 Monitoring
controls.description: Security event monitoring is 24x7 (in-house or MSSP) (FFIEC CAT Domain 3, Baseline).

controls.title: Detective — SIEM Deployment
controls.description: Centralized SIEM aggregates logs from network, system, + application layers (FFIEC CAT Domain 3, Evolving).

controls.title: Detective — Behavioral Analytics
controls.description: User + entity behavior analytics (UEBA) deployed for anomaly detection (FFIEC CAT Domain 3, Advanced).

controls.title: Corrective — Incident Containment Capability
controls.description: Documented containment playbooks + automated containment tooling (FFIEC CAT Domain 3, Evolving).

controls.title: Corrective — Backup + Recovery Capability
controls.description: Backup + recovery infrastructure tested + aligned with institution's RTO + RPO (FFIEC CAT Domain 3, Baseline).

controls.title: Vendor Inventory + Risk Tiering
controls.description: Documented vendor inventory with risk-tier classification (FFIEC CAT Domain 4, Baseline).

controls.title: Vendor Cyber Due Diligence
controls.description: Documented vendor cybersecurity due diligence covering: SOC reports, security questionnaires, on-site review for critical vendors (FFIEC CAT Domain 4, Baseline).

controls.title: Vendor Contract Cybersecurity Provisions
controls.description: Vendor contracts include: right-to-audit, breach notification, data protection, subcontracting controls (FFIEC CAT Domain 4, Baseline).

controls.title: Ongoing Vendor Monitoring
controls.description: Documented ongoing monitoring covering: SOC report refreshes, vendor incidents, regulatory matters (FFIEC CAT Domain 4, Baseline).

controls.title: Concentration Risk Analysis
controls.description: Vendor concentration risk assessed across providers, geographies, + service categories (FFIEC CAT Domain 4, Evolving).

controls.title: 4th-Party / Subcontractor Visibility
controls.description: Visibility into critical-vendor 4th-party relationships (FFIEC CAT Domain 4, Evolving).

controls.title: Incident Response Plan
controls.description: Documented incident response plan covering detection through post-incident review (FFIEC CAT Domain 5, Baseline).

controls.title: Incident Response Testing
controls.description: Annual incident response testing via tabletop exercises (FFIEC CAT Domain 5, Baseline).

controls.title: Customer + Regulatory Notification Procedures
controls.description: Documented procedures for customer + regulatory incident notification per applicable laws + 36-hour FFIEC rule (FFIEC CAT Domain 5, Baseline).

controls.title: Resilience — BC/DR Capability
controls.description: Tested BC/DR capability supporting documented RTO + RPO (FFIEC CAT Domain 5, Baseline).

controls.title: Forensic Capability
controls.description: In-house or contracted forensic capability for material incident investigation (FFIEC CAT Domain 5, Evolving).

controls.title: Cyber Insurance Coverage
controls.description: Cyber insurance coverage assessed against the institution's risk profile + reviewed annually (FFIEC CAT Domain 5, Evolving).

controls.title: Live-Fire Resilience Testing
controls.description: Live-fire (red-team / threat-led) resilience testing performed periodically (FFIEC CAT Domain 5, Advanced).
